title: dryopteris gymnophylla
intro: Dryopteris gymnophylla, also known as the Gymnophyllis fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris gymnophylla include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
